title: Index of character utf8 is wrong
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(col1 TEXT DEFAULT NULL, col2 TEXT DEFAULT NULL, col3 INTEGER NOT NULL);
SELECT * FROM t2 WHERE col1 LIKE 'amysql%';
UPDATE t2 SET col1 = NULL WHERE col2 = 'b';
key_bug_features: Incorrect handling of UTF-8 character indexing
